rulings.Case Title: SHANNON DEATON et al VS. CAROLYN CHANDLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiffs Shannon Deaton And Scott Herrin For Cost Of Proof Sanctions Against Cross-Defendant Chaney Construction Pursuant To Ccp 2033.420
rulings.Rulings: Plaintiffs' motion for new trial is denied. The Court has previously considered and decided the evidentiary issues presented and sees no basis to reconsider or change its rulings. The Court will not increase the jury's verdict, which is not unreasonable based on the evidence. The parties must advise each other whether or not they plan to appear to contest this tentative ruling and must also advise the Court (415-551-3683). If there is a hearing, it will be held in Department 604 of the San Francisco Superior Court Civic Center Courthouse at 2:00 p.m. Friday, January 9, 2015.

rulings.Case Title: SHANNON DEATON et al VS. CAROLYN CHANDLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiffs Shannon Deaton And Scott Herrin For Cost Of Proof Sanctions Against Defendants Chandler Properties And Octavia Associates Llc Pursuant To Ccp 2033.420
rulings.Rulings: PLaintiffs' motions for cost of proof sanctions are denied. As to Defendants, Plaintiffs have not shown improper denials. As to cross-defendant Chaney Construction, even assuming improper denials (which the Court does not find), Plaintiffs had no claim against this party, did not need to prove any facts as against this party, and already had sufficient admissions from the defendants. The parties must advise each other whether or not they plan to appear to contest this tentative ruling and must also advise the Court (415-551-3683). If there is a hearing, it will be held in Department 604 of the San Francisco Superior Court Civic Center Courthouse at 2:00 p.m. Friday, January 9, 2015.
